prompt: Photoreal high-end 3D animated feature film, cinematic anamorphic look. FIGHTER A, the Sponge Fighter: a bright-yellow rectangular kitchen-sponge creature with porous sponge texture and holes along his sides, big round blue eyes, two big front buck teeth, skinny noodle arms and legs, wearing a small flowing RED CAPE, aviator goggles, white karate sparring gloves, plain blue shorts and black shoes. His face is set in fierce determined concentration. His powers: lightning-fast karate, blowing giant glistening soap bubbles, and sponge resilience where impacts squash him flat like an accordion and he springs back unharmed. FIGHTER B, the Green Gladiator: a colossal green-skinned muscle giant, heavy scowling brow, shaggy dark hair, a bronze spiked pauldron strapped on his left shoulder, leather bracers on both forearms, bold white tribal war paint striped across his chest and face, ragged dark-gray shorts, barefoot, three times taller than the sponge. He wields a massive two-handed STONE WAR HAMMER. His powers: earth-shattering strength, a two-handed thunderclap that fires a visible ring-shaped shockwave, skyscraper leaps into ground-pound impacts, and a rage mode where his war paint glows green and his muscles swell. SETTING: an ancient stone ruins arena on a mountain plateau at storm dusk, heavy rain, rain-slicked flagstones with puddles reflecting lightning, mist rolling between broken pillars, warm fire glow in the distance. STYLE: teal-and-orange cinematic grade, cool blue storm shadows with warm amber rim light, volumetric rain and mist, film grain, shallow depth of field on close-ups. Intense but clean PG action: absolutely no blood, no gore, no injuries shown; impacts read as water spray, mist bursts, shockwaves and sparks. No text, no HUD, no interface graphics anywhere. No dialogue; thunder, rain and deep cinematic impacts in the audio. SCENE 3 of 5 (15 seconds), shot list: SCENE OPENS exactly on this composition: close-up of the Sponge Fighter with aviator goggles down over his eyes, determined scowl, rain running off the lenses. 0-3s: he explodes forward, a low fast tracking shot skimming the flooded flagstones as he sprints, cape snapping, water spraying off his shoes. 3-7s: the gladiator swings the stone hammer in a flat arc; extreme slow motion as the sponge slides under the swing on his knees, water peeling off the hammerhead inches above him. 7-11s: the sponge leaps onto the hammer's long handle, sprints up it and along the gladiator's bracered arm, and unleashes a lightning-fast flurry of karate chops to the gladiator's jaw, each impact a burst of mist and sparks, then backflips away through the rain. 11-15s: the gladiator staggers, drops the stone hammer with a heavy clatter onto the flagstones, and crashes down onto one knee, war paint dripping in the rain; the sponge lands neatly in the foreground in a karate stance. FINAL FRAME, HOLD LAST 1.5 SECONDS: wide shot, the Green Gladiator on one knee mid-frame with the stone hammer lying flat on the stones beside him, the Sponge Fighter landed in a low stance in the foreground rain.
